items.title: French national shows symptoms on return from hantavirus-hit ship
items.summary: Five passengers of the MV Hondius will be quarantined in Paris "until further notice", France's prime minister says.

items.title: His father had just been buried. Then West Bank settlers forced him to dig up the body
items.summary: The UN human rights office condemns incident as "'appalling and emblematic of the dehumanisation of Palestinians" in the West Bank.

items.title: Trump calls Iran response to US proposal to end war 'totally unacceptable'
items.summary: No details have been released of Iran's response - or the US proposals - designed to bring the war to an end.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美國官員：川普會就伊朗議題對習近平施壓
items.summary: 美國總統川普積極尋求達成結束中東戰爭協議之際，一名高階政府官員今天表示，川普未來幾天訪問北京時，準備再次就伊朗議題向中國國家主席習近平施壓。  法新社報導，根據白宮消息，貿易、關稅和人工智慧...…

items.title: 和平獎得主穆哈瑪迪送德黑蘭醫院　基金會證實
items.summary: 諾貝爾和平獎得主、伊朗維權人士穆哈瑪迪的基金會今天表示，她在獄中發生昏倒情況超過一週後，現在已經被送到德黑蘭一家醫院。  美聯社報導，憂心穆哈瑪迪（Narges Mohammadi）病情危急...…

items.title: 領空遭烏克蘭無人機入侵　拉脫維亞國防部長辭職
items.summary: 在兩架烏克蘭無人機闖入領空並且擊中儲油設施後，拉脫維亞國防部長斯普魯茲於今天辭職。  法新社報導，斯普魯茲（Adris Spruds）是在總理希林娜（Evika Silina）要求下作出辭職...…
